message:
🐛 Guard chart components against division by zero (NaN in SVG paths) (#1602)

When max/maxValue is 0, division produces NaN which propagates into
SVG path d attributes causing "Expected number" errors. Guard all
percentage calculations with max > 0 check across Gauge, ProgressBar,
CircularProgress, SegmentedProgressBar, HorseshoeGauge, PremiumGauge,
and KVCacheMonitor components.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
